{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240105153AE75F7C1E164BA81C43"}"},"total":2120},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7281783648104448827","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"加油，我感觉这是一本比较好的封神小说，没有那么无脑说的有理有据，我感觉会大火，不想其他的封神小说，太无脑了，有个系统就以为自己无敌了，然后人皇的神翼是一点都没写出来，反正我觉得这本小说写的挺好的，最后来一句加油，凑个100字"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695423656,"group_id":"7264254502746721280","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/u7kCkcR9QqlU6uIuLStsq4NJtFJSSFbAKfUJ7R5VTL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5d1871785ca7410e8773bf0505491c93~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883013&x-signature=DBypXrpNWvkttpBv%2BCP5WOzGuFc%3D","user_id":"3535650174805740","user_name":"用户 彪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3535650174805740","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1718355922,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7264254502746721280","book_info":{"abstract":"[封神：大王收手吧，外面全是仙子]
穿越到女娲宫题诗之后的时刻，成了纣王；殷受有点慌，系统呢？金手指呢？
这里可是封神，励精图治有什么用？
殷受决定开摆！
不就是昏君么，不就是沉湎酒色、骄奢淫逸么……这谁还不会？
“苏护，速速送苏妲己入朝歌！”
“申国师，听说你交由广泛……不置可否介绍三霄仙姑与寡人相识？”
“太师，我也想跟金灵圣母学道法！”
“哪吒，还不叫爹！”
“杨戬，我也是你爹！”
……

殷受在昏君的道路上越走越远，可是大商的气运竟然不跌反涨，殷受身上也慢慢觉醒人皇的威能，一言可定生死，一语可兴气运，一旨可封人道之神！
